notes: Bug fixes: progress bar can no longer stick on Starting; cull rejects occluded/empty frames; About links to the online Manual.
notes_mac: Fixes a silent failure: converting RAW to DNG without Adobe DNG Converter now shows a clear error instead of 'done' with an empty folder. New one-time setup prompt installs the free converter straight from Adobe. Plus: personal 30-day full-app beta window from your first launch.
